'''鈭歮-p-sh-p''' ('''kamapshepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modulize|modulize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modulize|modulize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-p-sh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kamapshepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimapshepoko|thimapshepoko]] || [[word:jimapshepoko|jimapshepoko]] || [[word:shimapshepoko|shimapshepoko]] || [[word:kimapshepoko|kimapshepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumapshepoko|thuthumapshepoko]] || [[word:jujumapshepoko|jujumapshepoko]] || [[word:shushumapshepoko|shushumapshepoko]] || [[word:kukumapshepoko|kukumapshepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumapshepoko|thumapshepoko]] || [[word:jumapshepoko|jumapshepoko]] || [[word:shumapshepoko|shumapshepoko]] || [[word:kumapshepoko|kumapshepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumapshepoko|thumapshepoko]] || [[word:jumapshepoko|jumapshepoko]] || [[word:shumapshepoko|shumapshepoko]] || [[word:kumapshepoko|kumapshepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themapshepoko|themapshepoko]] || [[word:jemapshepoko|jemapshepoko]] || [[word:shemapshepoko|shemapshepoko]] || [[word:kemapshepoko|kemapshepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomapshepoko|thothomapshepoko]] || [[word:jojomapshepoko|jojomapshepoko]] || [[word:shoshomapshepoko|shoshomapshepoko]] || [[word:kokomapshepoko|kokomapshepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomapshepoko|thomapshepoko]] || [[word:jomapshepoko|jomapshepoko]] || [[word:shomapshepoko|shomapshepoko]] || [[word:komapshepoko|komapshepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomapshepoko|thomapshepoko]] || [[word:jomapshepoko|jomapshepoko]] || [[word:shomapshepoko|shomapshepoko]] || [[word:komapshepoko|komapshepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mapshepoko|th忙mapshepoko]] || [[word:j忙mapshepoko|j忙mapshepoko]] || [[word:sh忙mapshepoko|sh忙mapshepoko]] || [[word:k忙mapshepoko|k忙mapshepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamapshepoko|thathamapshepoko]] || [[word:jajamapshepoko|jajamapshepoko]] || [[word:shashamapshepoko|shashamapshepoko]] || [[word:kakamapshepoko|kakamapshepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamapshepoko|thamapshepoko]] || [[word:jamapshepoko|jamapshepoko]] || [[word:shamapshepoko|shamapshepoko]] || [[word:kamapshepoko|kamapshepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamapshepoko|thamapshepoko]] || [[word:jamapshepoko|jamapshepoko]] || [[word:shamapshepoko|shamapshepoko]] || [[word:kamapshepoko|kamapshepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
